# Crontinel

> Open-source monitoring for cron jobs, queues, workers, and background tasks. Catch silent failures before users notice. Framework-agnostic — Laravel, Node.js, Python, PHP, or any stack.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://crontinel.com/): Crontinel product overview — cron & queue monitoring for any framework
- [Features](https://crontinel.com/features/): Full feature list — supervisors, queue depth, cron runs, alerts, integrations
- [Pricing](https://crontinel.com/pricing/): Pricing plans — Free (1 app), Pro ($19.99/mo), Team ($49.99/mo)
- [FAQ](https://crontinel.com/faq/): Frequently asked questions about Crontinel
- [About](https://crontinel.com/about/): About Crontinel — the product and the team
- [Security](https://crontinel.com/security/): Security practices, encryption, data handling
- [Cookie Policy](https://crontinel.com/cookie-policy/): Cookie usage and consent

## Documentation

- [Docs Home](https://docs.crontinel.com/introduction/): Getting started guide and full documentation
- [Installation](https://docs.crontinel.com/installation/): Quick start — 1-minute setup
- [Laravel Package](https://docs.crontinel.com/laravel/): Laravel SDK setup and usage
- [Node.js SDK](https://docs.crontinel.com/node/): Node.js SDK setup and usage
- [Python SDK](https://docs.crontinel.com/python/): Python SDK setup and usage
- [API Reference](https://docs.crontinel.com/api-reference/): Full API documentation

## Blog

- [Blog Home](https://crontinel.com/blog/): Crontinel blog — cron monitoring guides, tips, and comparisons
- [Laravel Schedule WithoutOverlapping Explained](https://crontinel.com/blog/laravel-schedule-withoutoverlapping-explained/): How to use withoutOverlapping in Laravel
- [Laravel Failed Jobs Monitoring](https://crontinel.com/blog/laravel-failed-jobs-monitoring/): How to track and monitor failed Laravel jobs
- [Cron Monitoring Pricing Compared 2026](https://crontinel.com/blog/cron-monitoring-pricing-compared-2026/): Comparison of cron monitoring tools and their pricing
- [Horizon Supervisor Stopped](https://crontinel.com/blog/horizon-supervisor-stopped-jobs-not-processing/): How to detect Horizon supervisor failures
- [Better Stack Cron Monitoring](https://crontinel.com/blog/better-stack-cron-monitoring-gone/): What happened to Better Stack cron monitoring
- [How to Set Up Laravel Cron Monitoring](https://crontinel.com/blog/how-to-set-up-laravel-cron-monitoring/): Step-by-step setup guide

## Use Cases

- [Use Cases Home](https://crontinel.com/use-cases/): All monitoring use cases by framework and scenario
- [Monitor Laravel cron jobs](https://crontinel.com/use-cases/monitor-laravel-cache-clear-cron-job-failed/): Detect when cache-clear cron jobs fail
- [Monitor Reverb server](https://crontinel.com/use-cases/monitor-reverb-server/): Monitor Laravel Reverb WebSocket server health
- Monitor cron jobs in Node.js, Python, PHP — see [all use cases](https://crontinel.com/use-cases/)

## Comparisons

- [Comparisons Home](https://crontinel.com/vs/): Crontinel vs other monitoring tools
- [Crontinel vs Oh Dear](https://crontinel.com/vs/oh-dear/)
- [Crontinel vs Healthchecks.io](https://crontinel.com/vs/healthchecks-io/)
- [Crontinel vs Better Stack](https://crontinel.com/vs/better-stack/)
- [Crontinel vs Cronitor](https://crontinel.com/vs/cronitor/)
- [Crontinel vs Dead Man's Snitch](https://crontinel.com/vs/dead-mans-snitch/)
- [Crontinel vs Pulse](https://crontinel.com/vs/pulse/)
- [Crontinel vs Checkly](https://crontinel.com/vs/checkly/)

## Integrations

- [Integrations Home](https://crontinel.com/integrations/): All supported integrations and alert channels
- [Slack Integration](https://crontinel.com/integrations/slack/): Send alerts to Slack channels
- [Discord Integration](https://crontinel.com/integrations/discord/): Send alerts to Discord channels
- [Telegram Integration](https://crontinel.com/integrations/telegram/): Send alerts to Telegram
- [Email Integration](https://crontinel.com/integrations/email/): Configure email alert notifications
- [PagerDuty Integration](https://crontinel.com/integrations/pagerduty/): PagerDuty on-call alerting
- [Webhook Integration](https://crontinel.com/integrations/webhook/): Custom webhook alert delivery
- [Gotify Integration](https://crontinel.com/integrations/gotify/): Self-hosted push notifications

## SDKs & Packages

- [Crontinel Laravel Package](https://packagist.org/packages/crontinel/laravel): Composer package for Laravel — `composer require crontinel/laravel`
- [Crontinel Node.js SDK](https://www.npmjs.com/package/crontinel): npm package — `npm install crontinel`
- [Crontinel Python SDK](https://pypi.org/project/crontinel/): pip package — `pip install crontinel`
- [Crontinel PHP SDK](https://packagist.org/packages/crontinel/php): Standalone PHP package

## Open Source

- [GitHub Organization](https://github.com/crontinel): Crontinel on GitHub
- [Main Repo](https://github.com/crontinel/crontinel): Crontinel product hub — README with full ecosystem overview
- [Laravel Package Source](https://github.com/crontinel/laravel): Open source Laravel SDK
- [App Source](https://github.com/crontinel/app): Crontinel SaaS backend (Laravel + Livewire)
- [Landing Page Source](https://github.com/crontinel/landing): This landing page (Astro)

## Status & Support

- [Status Page](https://status.crontinel.com): Crontinel service status
- [Community](https://github.com/crontinel/crontinel/discussions): GitHub Discussions for community support
